description: A sample Spectral ruleset extending the built-in OpenAPI ruleset and adding custom rules for tag and operation consistency.

operation-summary-required.description: All operations must have a summary.
operation-summary-required.message: Operation {{path}} is missing a summary field.

operation-tags-required.description: All operations must have at least one tag.
operation-tags-required.message: Operation {{path}} must have at least one tag.

info-contact-required.description: The info object must contain a contact.
info-contact-required.message: API spec is missing contact information in the info object.
